title: Stranger Things Experience
description: Survive the Demogorgon! This pack brings the Upside Down to your world with all sorts of weapons from ww2 and other time periods to fight back against the monster!
body:
This modpack features The Upside Down mod which adds the Demogorgon and the parallel "Upside Down" to your world. It's NOT a dimension mod, instead it's parallel, just like the show!!

This pack adds guns and vehicles from Call to Battle and a couple of other mods to help survive the Demogorgon. 

![M1911 versus Demogorgon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/abd9298a6df275b46f3805c4a848a61c0450da31_0.webp)

If the Demogorgon finds you, it will bring you into the Upside Down. Find the gate it created to escape! 

![Escape through the gate!!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5a148e5dffd83716c8069f09237f4697cef9369f.png)
